</head><body class="index-page"><div id="unified-header"></div><div class="background-wrapper"><div class="page-body"><div class="top-section" data-section="top"><div class="section-header"><div class="table-title"><img src="images/icons/home.svg" alt="דף הבית" class="section-icon"> דף הבית - TikTrack </div><div class="table-actions"><button data-button-type="TOGGLE" data-variant="small" data-onclick="toggleSection('top')" data-text="הצג/הסתר" title="הצג/הסתר סקשן"></button></div></div><div class="section-body"><active-alerts></active-alerts><div class="info-summary" id="summaryStats"><div>סה"כ טריידים: <strong id="totalTrades">0</strong></div><div>סה"כ התראות: <strong id="totalAlerts">0</strong></div><div>יתרה נוכחית: <strong id="currentBalance">$0</strong></div><div>רווח/הפסד: <strong id="totalPnL">$0</strong></div></div></div></div><div class="main-content"><div class="content-section" id="main"><div class="section-header"><div class="table-title"><img src="images/icons/home.svg" alt="לוח בקרה" class="section-icon"> לוח בקרה </div><div class="table-count" id="dashboardCount">טוען...</div><div class="table-actions"><button data-button-type="TOGGLE" data-variant="small" data-onclick="toggleSection('main')" data-text="הצג/הסתר" title="הצג/הסתר סקשן"></button></div></div><div class="section-body"><div class="row"><div class="col-md-6"><div class="card"><div class="card-header"><h5>טריידים אחרונים</h5></div><div class="card-body"><div id="recentTrades">טוען טריידים...</div></div></div></div><div class="col-md-6"><div class="card"><div class="card-header"><h5>התראות פעילות</h5></div><div class="card-body"><div id="activeAlerts">טוען התראות...</div></div></div></div></div><div class="row mt-3"><div class="col-md-4"><div class="card"><div class="card-header"><h5>סטטוס טריידים</h5></div><div class="card-body"><canvas id="tradesStatusChart" width="300" height="200"></canvas></div></div></div><div class="col-md-4"><div class="card"><div class="card-header"><h5>חשבונות</h5></div><div class="card-body"><canvas id="accountChart" width="300" height="200"></canvas></div></div></div><div class="col-md-4"><div class="card"><div class="card-header"><h5>גרף מעורב</h5></div><div class="card-body"><canvas id="mixedChart" width="300" height="200"></canvas></div></div></div></div><div class="row mt-3"><div class="col-md-12"><div class="card"><div class="card-header"><h5>ביצועים</h5></div><div class="card-body"><canvas id="performanceChart" width="400" height="200"></canvas></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div style="height: 3rem;"></div><div class="notification-container" id="notificationContainer"></div><div id="toastContainer" class="toast-container position-fixed top-0 end-0 p-3"></div></div><script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js?v=0da3519a_20251102_104906"></script>

<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="he" dir="rtl"><head><meta charset="UTF-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"><title>תחקיר - TikTrack</title><link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Sans+Hebrew:wght@100;200;300;400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"><link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css?v=0da3519a_20251102_104906" rel="stylesheet"><link rel="stylesheet" href="styles-new/master.css?v=0da3519a_20251102_104906"><link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.0/font/bootstrap-icons.css?v=0da3519a_20251102_104906"><link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.0.0/css/all.min.css?v=0da3519a_20251102_104906"></head><body class="research-page"><div id="unified-header"></div><div class="background-wrapper"><div class="page-body"><div class="top-section" data-section="top"><div class="section-header"><h2>🔍 תחקיר שוק - סקירה כללית</h2><div class="section-actions"><button data-button-type="TOGGLE" data-variant="small" data-onclick="toggleSection('top')" data-text="הצג/הסתר" title="הצג/הסתר סקשן"></button></div></div><div class="section-body"><p>בדף זה תוכל לבצע תחקיר מעמיק על השוק, לנתח מגמות ולקבל תובנות חשובות.</p></div></div><div class="content-section" id="researchMain"><div class="section-header"><h1 class="section-title">🔍 תחקיר שוק</h1><div class="section-actions"><button data-button-type="SAVE" data-classes="btn btn-primary" data-text="שמור"></button><button data-button-type="SAVE" data-classes="btn btn-primary" data-text="שמור"></button><button data-button-type="SAVE" data-classes="btn btn-primary" data-text="שמור"></button></div></div><div class="section-body"><div class="row mb-4"><div class="col-md-6"><div class="card"><div class="card-header"><h5>📊 כלי תחקיר</h5></div><div class="card-body"><div class="d-grid gap-2"><button data-button-type="SAVE" data-classes="btn btn-primary" data-text="שמור"></button><button data-button-type="SAVE" data-classes="btn btn-primary" data-text="שמור"></button><button data-button-type="SAVE" data-classes="btn btn-primary" data-text="שמור"></button></div></div></div></div><div class="col-md-6"><div class="card"><div class="card-header"><h5>📈 נתונים מהירים</h5></div><div class="card-body"><div class="d-grid gap-2"><button data-button-type="SAVE" data-classes="btn btn-primary" data-text="שמור"></button><button data-button-type="SAVE" data-classes="btn btn-primary" data-text="שמור"></button><button data-button-type="SAVE" data-classes="btn btn-primary" data-text="שמור"></button></div></div></div></div></div><div class="card"><div class="card-header"><h5>📋 תוצאות תחקיר</h5></div><div class="card-body"><div id="researchResults"><div class="summary-cards"><div class="summary-card"><div class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-graph-up"></i></div><div class="card-content"><div class="card-title">רווח כולל</div><div class="card-value">₪12,450</div><div class="card-change positive">+₪1,250 (11.2%)</div></div></div><div class="summary-card"><div class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-pie-chart"></i></div><div class="card-content"><div class="card-title">תיקון כולל</div><div class="card-value">₪125,000</div><div class="card-change positive">+₪8,500 (7.3%)</div></div></div><div class="summary-card"><div class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-activity"></i></div><div class="card-content"><div class="card-title">תנודתיות</div><div class="card-value">15.2%</div><div class="card-change negative">+2.1%</div></div></div></div><div class="table-responsive mt-4"><table class="table table-striped" id="researchTable"><thead><tr><th>טיקר</th><th>מחיר נוכחי</th><th>שינוי</th><th>נפח</th><th>מגמה</th><th>פעולות</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>AAPL</td><td>₪150.25</td><td class="text-success">+2.5%</td><td>45.2M</td><td><span class="badge bg-success">עולה</span></td><td><button data-button-type="SAVE" data-classes="btn btn-primary" data-text="שמור"></button></td></tr><tr><td>GOOGL</td><td>₪2,850.75</td><td class="text-danger">-1.2%</td><td>12.8M</td><td><span class="badge bg-warning">יציב</span></td><td><button data-button-type="SEARCH" data-variant="full" data-onclick="analyzeTicker('GOOGL')" data-text="פילטר" title="פילטר"></button><button data-button-type="SEARCH" data-variant="full" data-onclick="analyzeTicker('GOOGL')" data-text="נתח" title="נתח"></button></td></tr><tr><td>TSLA</td><td>₪890.50</td><td class="text-success">+5.8%</td><td>78.5M</td><td><span class="badge bg-success">עולה</span></td><td><button data-button-type="SEARCH" data-variant="full" data-onclick="analyzeTicker('TSLA')" data-text="פילטר" title="פילטר"></button><button data-button-type="SEARCH" data-variant="full" data-onclick="analyzeTicker('TSLA')" data-text="נתח" title="נתח"></button></td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div style="height: 3rem;"></div><div class="notification-container" id="notificationContainer"></div><div id="toastContainer" class="toast-container position-fixed top-0 end-0 p-3"></div></div><script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.0/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js?v=0da3519a_20251102_104906"></script>
💡 המלצה: המר ל-data-onclick="toggleSection(" או השתמש ב-Button System
ממצא #375 כפתור
קובץ: /Users/nimrod/Documents/TikTrack/TikTrackApp/trading-ui/research.html
שורה: 1
onclick: analyzeTicker(
